report.summary: v8 community cycle: Added CLARITY Act regulation breakthrough content (tweet + 4-part explainer thread), updated whale accumulation to 270K BTC / $23B (13-year high), added exchange supply (2.7M, lowest since 2018) and RSI (27) data points, created 2 new social cards, updated newsletter to v4 with regulation + whale dual angle, all links deployment-safe.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet: Whale Accumulation Signal — 270K BTC ($23B) in 30 days, 13-year high, convergence signals (F&G 10, RSI 27, exchange supply 2.7M), links to /tools/whale-tracker (LIVE)
Tweet: DCA in Extreme Fear — 46 consecutive days, 1,145% fear-based DCA vs 202% standard, links to /tools/dca-calculator (LIVE)
Tweet: Monday Macro Recap — BTC $68K, $243M liquidations, oil $112, CLARITY Act update, links to /tools/fear-greed-timeline (LIVE)
Tweet: CLARITY Act Breakthrough — stablecoin yield compromise reached, Senate hearing late April, links to /learn/defi-regulation-guide (LIVE)

Thread (4-part): CLARITY Act Explainer — passive yield banned, activity-based allowed, 18 digital commodities classified, BTC/ETH non-securities, links to /learn/defi-regulation-guide + /ecosystem (LIVE)
Tweet: Engagement Poll — which CLARITY Act milestone matters most (schedule Thursday)
Discord/TG: Late Monday update v2 — market snapshot, regulation update, 4 live tool links, coming-this-week teaser
Newsletter v4 for Thu Mar 27: Whale accumulation + CLARITY Act dual lead, ecosystem deep dives feature, fear-based DCA Degen Corner

CLARITY Act card v2 (1200x630 SVG) — stablecoin yield rules (banned vs allowed), 3 regulatory milestone boxes (18 commodities, BTC/ETH non-securities, Senate hearing), timeline progress indicator
